name: ctu-mitsubishi

metadata.name: ctu_mitsubishi
metadata.summary: Package to control CTU/CIIRC robots Mitsubishi.

documentation:
# Control of Mitsubishi RV6S robot at CIIRC CTU


## How to start the robot
- Turn the robot power using the white switch on the front panel of the control unit.
- Make sure robot is set to Automatic mode (or Ext. Automatic mode) - modes are controlled by key switch on the front panel.

## Quick example
```python
from ctu_mitsubishi import Rv6s, Rv6sGripper

gripper = Rv6sGripper()
gripper.open()
gripper.close()

robot = Rv6s()
robot.initialize()

q = robot.get_q()
q[0] += 0.1
robot.move_to_q(q)

robot.stop_robot()
robot.close_connection()
```

See more examples in the `examples` folder.

methods.name: ctu_mitsubishi.rv6s_gripper.Rv6sGripper.open
documentation: Start opening the gripper and stop after duration in seconds.

methods.name: ctu_mitsubishi.rv6s_gripper.Rv6sGripper.close
documentation: Start closing the gripper and stop after duration in seconds.

methods.name: ctu_mitsubishi.rv6s_gripper.Rv6sGripper.disconnect
documentation: Stop controlling the gripper.

functions.name: ctu_mitsubishi.utils.circle_circle_intersection
documentation:
Computes intersection of the circles defined by center c_i and radius r_i.
Returns empty array if there is no solution, two solutions otherwise. If there
are infinite number of solutions, select two (almost) randomly.

documentation: !/usr/bin/env python
Copyright (c) CTU -- All Rights Reserved
Created on: 2024-11-28
Author: Vladimir Petrik <vladimir.petrik@cvut.cz>

methods.name: ctu_mitsubishi.rv6s.Rv6s.__del__
documentation: Stop robot and close the connection to the robot's control unit.

methods.name: ctu_mitsubishi.rv6s.Rv6s.close_connection
documentation: Close the connection to the robot's control unit.

methods.name: ctu_mitsubishi.rv6s.Rv6s.stop_robot
documentation: Stop the robot and perform a safe shutdown.

methods.name: ctu_mitsubishi.rv6s.Rv6s._send_and_receive
documentation: Send a message to the robot and return the response.

methods.name: ctu_mitsubishi.rv6s.Rv6s.initialize
documentation: Performs robot initialization.

methods.name: ctu_mitsubishi.rv6s.Rv6s.get_q
documentation: Get current joint configuration [rad].

methods.name: ctu_mitsubishi.rv6s.Rv6s.move_to_q
documentation:
Move robot to the given joint configuration [rad] using coordinated movement.
Initialization has be called before to set up the robot.

methods.name: ctu_mitsubishi.rv6s.Rv6s.soft_home
documentation: Move robot to the home position using move to q function.

methods.name: ctu_mitsubishi.rv6s.Rv6s.in_limits
documentation: Return whether the given joint configuration is in joint limits.

methods.name: ctu_mitsubishi.rv6s.Rv6s._rx
documentation: Return SE3 transformation that rotates around x-axis.

methods.name: ctu_mitsubishi.rv6s.Rv6s._ry
documentation: Return SE3 transformation that rotates around x-axis.

methods.name: ctu_mitsubishi.rv6s.Rv6s._rz
documentation: Return SE3 transformation that rotates around z-axis.

methods.name: ctu_mitsubishi.rv6s.Rv6s._t
documentation: Return SE3 transformation that translates along x-axis.

methods.name: ctu_mitsubishi.rv6s.Rv6s.dh_to_se3
documentation: Compute SE3 matrix from DH parameters.

methods.name: ctu_mitsubishi.rv6s.Rv6s.fk
documentation:
Compute forward kinematics for the given joint configuration [rad].
Return pose of the end-effector in the base frame. Homogeneous transformation
matrix (4x4) is returned. The pose represents the flange pose w.r.t. base
of the robot.

methods.name: ctu_mitsubishi.rv6s.Rv6s._ik_5th_joint_pos
documentation:
Compute inverse kinematics for the given position of the 5th joint
(flange w.r.t. base) in the base frame.
Return list of joint configurations [rad] for the first three joints.

methods.name: ctu_mitsubishi.rv6s.Rv6s.ik
documentation:
Compute inverse kinematics for the given pose of the end-effector (flange
w.r.t. base) in the base frame. Homogeneous transformation matrix (4x4) is
expected. Only in limits solutions are returned.
Return list of joint configurations [rad].

methods.name: ctu_mitsubishi.rv6s.Rv6s.rotation_matrix_to_euler_zyz
documentation:
Extract Euler angles (ZYZ convention) from a rotation matrix.

Parameters:
    R (ndarray): 3x3 rotation matrix.

Returns:
    two solutions, 2 tuples: Euler angles (alpha, beta, gamma) in radians.

methods.name: ctu_mitsubishi.rv6s.Rv6s.wait_for_motion_stop
documentation:
Wait for the robot to stop moving.
Args:
    timeout: Maximum time to wait for the robot to stop moving.
    poll_interval: Time between checking the robot's state.
    tol: Tolerance for the robot's joint positions to be considered stopped
     [rad].
Returns:
    True if the robot has stopped moving in a given time, False otherwise.
